{{Infobox character
| name = Undermaker
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Defender of Tunnel City
| abilities = generate false matter
| affiliations = Advocate
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Undermaker is a middle-aged human male who serves as the protector of [[Tunnel City]]. He is an [[Advocate]], identifiable by a bronze 'A' insignia on his black and bronze combat suit, which features temperature regulation capabilities. He possesses the specialized ability to create temporary structures, such as walls and bridges, out of false matter. In combat, he utilizes a technique known as [[Combat Art]], which allows him to deliver powerful strikes through specific hand movements. Despite his role, he has a controversial history involving numerous starship accidents and crashes. He is proficient in the [[Trade]] language and has engaged in direct physical confrontation with [[Raion]].}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A middle-aged human man with weathered skin and graying hair, the Undermaker serves as a [[Combat Artist]] and an [[Advocate]] pilot. Working in disaster relief, he holds the position of Defender of [[Tunnel City]]. He utilizes his unique ability to generate false matter to [[construct]] essential structures like walls and bridges. For his duties, he wears a skintight black combat suit featuring bronze highlights, temperature regulation functions, and an [[Advocate]] 'A' displayed on his chest.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] is the Defender of [[Tunnel City]] and an [[Advocate]] pilot.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] is a human man in his middle years with graying hair and weathered skin.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] wears a skintight black suit with bronze highlights and an [[Advocate]] ‘A’ on his chest.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] has the ability to generate false matter to [[construct]] bridges and walls.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] is a [[Combat Artist]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] is an [[Advocate]] who works in disaster relief.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Undermaker]] wears a combat suit with a temperature regulation function.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Advocate]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
